title: ScheMatiQ: From Research Question to Structured Data through Interactive Schema Discovery
abstract: arXiv:2604.09237v2 Announce Type: replace  Abstract: Many disciplines pose natural-language research questions over large document collections whose answers typically require structured evidence, traditionally obtained by manually designing an annotation schema and exhaustively labeling the corpus, a slow and error-prone process. We introduce ScheMatiQ, which leverages calls to a backbone LLM to take a question and a corpus to produce a schema and a grounded database, with a web interface that lets steer and revise the extraction. In collaboration with domain experts, we show that ScheMatiQ yields outputs that support real-world analysis in law and computational biology. We release ScheMatiQ as open source with a public web interface, and invite experts across disciplines to use it with their own data. All resources, including the website, source code, and demonstration video, are available at: www.ScheMatiQ-ai.com

Title: ScheMatiQ: From Research Question to Structured Data through Interactive Schema Discovery
Abstract: arXiv:2604.09237v2 Announce Type: replace  Abstract: Many disciplines pose natural-language research questions over large document collections whose answers typically require structured evidence, traditionally obtained by manually designing an annotation schema and exhaustively labeling the corpus, a slow and error-prone process. We introduce ScheMatiQ, which leverages calls to a backbone LLM to take a question and a corpus to produce a schema and a grounded database, with a web interface that lets steer and revise the extraction. In collaboration with domain experts, we show that ScheMatiQ yields outputs that support real-world analysis in law and computational biology. translated_title: ScheMatiQ：通过交互式模式发现从研究问题到结构化数据
translated_abstract: arXiv:2604.09237v2 公告类型：替换 摘要：许多学科需要对大型文档集合提出自然语言研究问题，其答案通常需要结构化证据，传统上通过手动设计标注模式并详尽地标注语料库来获得，这是一个缓慢且容易出错的过程。我们引入了ScheMatiQ，它利用对骨干大语言模型的调用，接收一个问题和一个语料库，生成一个模式和一个有依据的数据库，并提供一个网络界面，允许用户引导和修订提取过程。通过与领域专家合作，我们展示了ScheMatiQ生成的输出能够支持法律和计算生物学领域的实际分析。我们将ScheMatiQ作为开源软件发布，并提供公共网络界面，邀请各学科专家使用自己的数据来使用它。所有资源，包括网站、源代码和演示视频，均可在以下网址获取：www.ScheMatiQ-ai.com
tldr: ScheMatiQ通过交互式模式发现，利用大语言模型自动从研究问题生成结构化数据库，支持法律和生物学等领域的实际分析，并作为开源工具提供。
en_tdlr: ScheMatiQ enables interactive schema discovery by leveraging large language models to automatically generate structured databases from research questions, supporting real-world analysis in fields like law and computational biology, and is released as an open-source tool.
